sharedStateObservations.observation: typecheck command has incorrect path 'nim_router/*.py' but should be 'scripts/nim_router/*.py'. This is a pre-existing bug in services.yaml, not caused by this feature.

VAL-OC-002.evidence: All script paths use {baseDir} prefix (nim_router.py, nim-capabilities.json, etc.)

VAL-CC-001.evidence: Frontmatter uses single-line keys without nested multi-line YAML. Metadata uses YAML flow style.

VAL-CX-001.evidence: SKILL.md provides name, description, short-description, aliases, trigger_keywords, and metadata
